name: transworld-engagement
releaseNote: Research Phase 2b (send side — immediate broadcast): a Send page per published report (editorial sub-brand) that renders the weekly report to a branded email and sends it from investment@ to selected active subscribers, with a test-send-to-me, select-all / select-only-not-yet-sent, and a prior-send banner. Per-recipient delivery is tracked in send_log (queued -> sent/failed with the Resend id). Every email carries a working opt-out: a per-contact unsubscribe link plus RFC 8058 List-Unsubscribe headers, backed by a public token-gated /research/unsubscribe page and /api/research/unsubscribe endpoint that flip report_subscriptions to unsubscribed. A human clicks send, so the cron-never-mails-clients rule does not apply; scheduled sends, the Resend webhook, and analytics remain Phase 2c/2d. Ports the retired portal's email stack (template, render, dispatch, tokens) onto contacts/report_subscriptions. Adds @react-email/components and @react-email/render; no schema change, no new environment variables.
